description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic cup with a smooth, slightly rounded body and a single, curved handle attached to one side. The cup is primarily a pale beige or off-white color, with a subtle matte finish that gives it a soft, understated appearance. The handle is a lighter shade, almost white, and is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. On one side of the cup, there is visible black text, possibly part of a word or phrase, adding a minimal decorative element. The interior of the cup appears to be the same color as the exterior, and the rim is gently rounded for comfortable drinking. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for everyday use in urban environments such as cafes, homes, or offices.
description: A pale beige ceramic cup with a white handle and minimal black text on one side, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The cup is shown from the side, highlighting its rounded body and the full, curved handle on the right.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed from the back, showing the handle directly in the center and no visible text.
description_view_2: The cup is angled to reveal the handle on the left and partial black text ('Ti') on the right side of the body.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the opposite side, with the handle barely visible and a small portion of black text ('m') on the left edge.
